text:
ご苦労だった。
まあ改めて言うべきことも特にないな。
今回は安心して見ていられたよ。

だが、そろそろ欲目を出しても
いい頃だろう。
テクニックが大きく開花することを

Good work. Good enough, in fact, that I don't
feel like you need to hear all my advice again.
You looked like you had a handle on things.

Anyway, it feels like it's time for me to let my
bias show a little I expect a great deal from
you in the future.
I'm eager to see your Techniques flourish.
